title: phaca conjuncta
intro: Phaca conjuncta, also known as the lupine or lupin, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and parts of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phaca conjuncta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system, among others. Phaca conjuncta can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can also be used in salads, providing a nutrient-rich herbal addition to meals.
intro_study: According to "Journal of the Indian Medical Association", phaca conjuncta benefits include improved vision in a few cases of cataract, correction of refractive errors in early myopia, control of progressive deteriorations in high myopic conditions, and healing capacity in allergic conjunctivitis.
